description: Officially released to the global market in April 2022, Toncoin (TON) is the native token of Open Network (TON) developed by Telegram. Now as a 1:1 TON price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 TON gives original TON holders, users and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure, and more scalable asset worldwide
name: Toncoin
